summary: Plan-only PR inventory classification. No shared canonical was selected because the job explicitly says this is not a dedupe cluster. Deterministically security-sensitive PRs are routed to central security handling with non-mutating route_security actions; unavailable live-state refs remain blocked for human review; already-closed refs stay skipped.
